title: Data probe
content:
{{Top|leg|hide=1}}
A '''data probe''' was a type of interface that could be fitted to [[Droid/Legends|droids]]<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> or used by individuals.<ref name="GG3">[[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]]</ref> The [[Mark VII "Inquisitor" Series Seeker Droid]] was outfitted with a data probe that was capable of interfacing with [[Computer/Legends|computers]], security monitors, and communications networks.<ref name="EGWT" /> [[Controller droid/Legends|Controller droids]] such as the [[12-4C-41 traffic control droid]] had a retractable dataprobe built into a finger on their left hand. [[NR-1100 slicer droid]]s hands with fingers, each of which could be used as a data probe.<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> On [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]], [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] used a data probe to locate several [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] who were being held captive by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].<ref name="GG3" />

==Appearances==
*[[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]]
